name: qits
//: App ingress so the host browser reaches the qits UI (Quinoa :4200 -> Quarkus :8080). Workspace containers publish nothing; qits reaches them by DNS name on qits-net.
//initialize: Create the external qits-net + shared volumes on the HOST before the stack comes up (idempotent). qits-net is shared with sibling workspace containers; qits_shared_dot_claude is the shared Claude Code login; m2/pnpm are shared build caches.
initializeCommand: docker network inspect qits-net >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker network create qits-net; for v in qits_shared_dot_claude qits_shared_m2 qits_shared_pnpm; do docker volume inspect $v >/dev/null 2>&1 || docker volume create $v; done
//postCreate: Build once so the `domain` module is resolvable from the local repo (fresh-checkout step from CLAUDE.md), inside the devcontainer's toolchain.
